metadata.name: Acid Quilt #364
metadata.description:
This is an abstract work. There is no true or correct orientation.

Inspired by repeater patterns, tiles, tessellations, and quilts. Not as goofy as the Collage of Collage set but still some goofiness to it. This collage set is made up of layers sketched on a really old ipad. 

The project does not have a repeater functions built in, just produces the single base unit. My hope is that the output be used on a larger canvas and repeated, tiled, or tessellated. Some outputs might could look good in a quilt. 

These online tools (as of Feb 2022) are easy to use for making tiles. Windows also makes it easy to tile, as does Photoshop:
- https://www.imgonline.com.ua/eng/check-texture-tiling.php
- https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/windows/win32/gdiplus/-gdiplus-tiling-a-shape-with-an-image-use
- https://prinfab.com/printed-fabric?r2=magic

(^This^ is very much not a best practice, including links in this description that might not exist in the future)

There are more than 1.3 billion possible combos!

Please enjoy!

metadata.name: Two Sides Of A Story #2
metadata.description:
I live inside a house
The house has a side that I love
On that side, there's a door that feels exciting to pass by
There's also a window that makes me always enthusiastic to take a peek outside
All of these make me happy

I live inside a house
The house has a side that I hate
On that side, there's a door that feels boring to pass by
There's also a window that makes me always apathetic to take a peek outside
But it's all fine for me

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Decayed Dickgenerative Art #99
metadata.description:
Dickgenerative art has gotten old. I brought some more out of storage only to find some goobs had gotten into them making the dicks go bad. I thought I would release them anyway.


I've been away for a while but not gone. Follow @cocktoid on twitter for more info on upcoming releases or to give feedback on past ones.

metadata.name: LIQUID #1
metadata.description:
Painting on canvas using feedback, modulations and noises to recreate the idea of an interactive 'liquid show'. Open livemode, activate your webcam and click on the canvas to start the interaction.
The artwork will adjust to your monitor's resolution but still maintain its aspect ratio.

In commemoration of FXHASH's 1 year anniversary.
You can control some parameters of the video input to adjust the effect with:
1 -> Inverts the brightness values
7/8 -> Increases or decreases the limit on the first parameter
+/- -> Increases or decreases the threshold on the second parameter
P' -> Saves a png from canvas

Designed for desktop computers on Google Chrome
Developed with Hydra.js

metadata.name: Engulfed In Murked #25
metadata.description:
“Core of energy was trapped and engulfed in the murked surrounding, disgracing its purity.”

This artwork was the continuation of the piece titled “Murked Being”. It also stands as another attempt to develop the aesthetic style for “Murked Being” universe lore creation.

Made using Hydra (https://hydra.ojack.xyz/)

Rangga Purnama Aji, 2022
https://linktr.ee/ranggapuraji

metadata.name: Sacred Imaginary Prisms Disintegrates #2
metadata.description:
Move your mouse from left to right, fastly/slowly, to disintegrate the fragmented prisms into dust textures.

Fastly move your mouse from right to left to create an unexpected disintegration turn.

Slowly put your mouse on the left side of the frame for adjusting the default view.
